name: Silver Elephant Mining Corp.
description: Silver Elephant Mining Corp. is a Canadian silver mining and exploration company. The company is focused on developing its premier Pulacayo silver-lead-zinc project in Bolivia, which has a historic production history and significant resource potential. Silver Elephant also holds interests in other mineral properties, including coal and nickel projects, aiming to create shareholder value through the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-grade mineral assets in stable jurisdictions.
